title: leon #3023
definition:
1) a lion
 2) a brave and mighty hero
 ++++
 Both Christ and Satan are referred to as a lion, indicating
 great strength, Satan as a "roaring lion" (\\#1Pe 5:8\\) and
 Christ as "the Lion of the tribe of Judah" (\\#Re 5:5\\).
